meaning: adj.无法模仿的,独特的,无比的
examples: He makes his own point in his own inimitable way.
Could we render this inimitable picture properly, then would everybody exclaim, "Beautiful, unparalleled Italy!"
His accent, an inimitable polyglot growl, radiates a weariness that comes with being what he calls a "global nomad."
The designer decorated 17 rooms in his inimitable style, along with the lobby, restaurant and bar.
However, they also have the strong desire and inimitable capacity to help change the world.
